zh.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪麗 阿爾德曼波瑞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Browne於1535年出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親John Browne25歲，母親Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden)21歲。她於大約1565年與Sir John Walter Hall在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1619年12月16日在英國倫敦享年84歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Browne于1535年出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲John Browne25岁，母亲Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden)21岁。她于大约1565年与Sir John Walter Hall在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1619年12月16日在英国倫敦享年84岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Anne

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Browne was born in 1535, in London, England, her father, John Browne, was 25 and her mother, Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden), was 21. She married Sir John Walter Hall about 1565, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 16 December 1619, in London, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in London, England.

fr.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: St Mary Aldermanbury, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Browne est née en 1535, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, John Browne, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden), avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Walter Hall environ 1565, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 décembre 1619, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Browne è nata il nel 1535 nel London, England, sua padre, John Browne, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden), aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Walter Hall circa 1565, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Anne Browneが1535年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父John Browneは25歳，母Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden)は21歳であった。約1565年にイギリスイギリスでSir John Walter Hallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1619年12月16日にイギリスロンドンで84歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 알더먼버이
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Browne(이)가 1535년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Browne(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden)(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1565년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Walter Hall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1619년 12월 16일 영국 런던에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Browne nasceu em 1535, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Browne, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden), tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Walter Hall aproximadamente 1565, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1619, em London, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England: ст мэри алдирманбури, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Browne родилась в 1535 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени John Browne было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Clarke Parnell  (ggmother of Lizzie Borden), 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Walter Hall около 1565 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 16 декабря 1619 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.
